requirement_topic.en: Noise marking and acoustic information for power tools
requirement_topic.zh: 电动工具噪声标识与噪声信息
requirement_topic.zht: 電動工具噪聲標識與噪聲資訊

summary.en: No publicly confirmed UAE requirement was identified that mirrors the EU-style outdoor-noise class marking for power tools. In practice, UAE import reviews focus on technical conformity and safety records first, while noise claims are handled via manuals, user information, and buyer-specific risk assessments where applicable.
summary.zh: 未发现可核实的阿联酋通用要求与欧盟户外噪声分级标识一一对应。实践中阿联酋更关注技术合规与安全证据，噪声信息通常在说明书、用户告知和买方要求下补充展示。
summary.zht: 未發現可核實的阿聯酋通用要求與歐盟戶外噪聲分級標識一一對應。實務上阿聯酋更關注技術合規與安全證據，噪聲資訊通常在說明書、使用者告知和買方要求下補充展示。

standards_or_laws: No known UAE mandatory EU-style outdoor-noise class marking requirement identified in current public ECAS context
UAE imports generally review noise evidence case-by-case when the buyer or category-specific route requests it

summary.en: China’s technical baseline can reference GB/T 4583-2007 noise measurement methodology for power tools and associated safety standards in the GB/T 3883 family. This is not equivalent to a UAE-wide mandatory noise label framework but is useful as a technical basis if UAE buyers request measured noise documentation.
summary.zh: 中国侧可参考GB/T 4583-2007《电动工具噪声测量方法》及GB/T 3883系列的安全技术路径。该体系不等同于阿联酋全国统一的噪声分级标签制度，但可作为买方要求噪声文件时的技术依据。
summary.zht: 中國側可參考 GB/T 4583-2007《電動工具噪音測量方法》及 GB/T 3883 系列的安全技術路徑。該體系不等同於阿聯酋全國統一的噪音分級標籤制度，但可作為買方要求噪音文件時的技術依據。

gap.en: Chinese exporters often assume noise marking is mandatory in the same way it is in some EU equipment discussions, but UAE practical handling is commonly documentation-first. A direct mapping from EU mark classes to UAE customs release is usually absent.
gap.zh: 中国企业常误以为EU噪声标签逻辑可直接套用，而UAE市场常以文件证明和产品用途说明为主，缺少可直接映射的欧盟式标志对接方式。
gap.zht: 中國企業常誤以為 EU 噪音標籤邏輯可直接套用，而 UAE 市場常以文件證明和產品用途說明為主，缺少可直接映射的歐盟式標誌對接方式。

mandatory_status.target: Not generally mandatory as a universal outdoor-noise label regime; requested only in specific buyer, safety, or testing contexts.
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory as a universal UAE-style marking model; Chinese domestic baseline uses measurement methodology for test planning and disclosure when needed.

source.publisher: National Standardization Site of China (GB/T catalog reference)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use noise measurements as evidence only when required by contract or importer process; do not treat UAE as a universal mandatory EU-noise class labeling destination.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在合同或进口商要求下提供噪声测试数据。不能把阿联酋当作统一要求EU式噪声分级标签的市场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在合同或進口商要求下提供噪音測試資料。不能把阿聯酋當作統一要求 EU 式噪音分級標籤的市場。
